rules.pattern: McpConfigService read() separation: all internal callers (runner, analyzer, generators) rely on defaults being merged. Separating read into readRaw() (pure disk) vs read() (with defaults) allows manage_config:read to show what the user actually stored, without breaking 15+ callers.
rules.solution: Keep read() returning deepMerge(DEFAULT_CONFIG, raw) for all internal callers. Add readRaw() returning Partial<McpConfig>|null for diagnostic/UI callers. Add preview(projectRoot, patch) for dry-run compute. Track lastWrittenAt: Date|null on the service instance — only write() and scaffold() set it, never read paths.

rules.pattern: exec() with string interpolation in ProjectSetupService/ProjectMaintenanceService — npm install and npx playwright install were called via shell exec, which opens && chaining injection
rules.solution: Split compound && shell commands into two sequential execFileAsync calls. Add `resolveExe()` shim for Windows .cmd extensions. Wrap both with withRetry(RetryPolicies.networkCall) since npm registry is transiently unreliable in CI. This is the pattern for all new process spawning.

rules.pattern: TASK-15: Credential & Git Safety — UserStoreService needs gitignore pre-validation before write, API key field rejection, and .env auto-gitignore
rules.solution: Pattern: (1) assertPathIsGitignored() calls ensureGitignore() before any credential file write, then reads .gitignore back to assert success — fail-fast if entry not present. (2) assertNoApiKeyFields() rejects any credential field matching API_KEY_FIELD_PATTERNS regex list with actionable error pointing to manage_env. (3) ensureEnvGitignored() ensures .env is in .gitignore as side-effect of every credential write. Execution order: ensureGitignore → verify → ensureEnvGitignored → write credential file → updateExampleFile (which also calls assertNoApiKeyFields per role).

rules.pattern: ICodebaseAnalyzer.existingPageObjects lacks locators field; HybridPromptEngine must proxy-estimate locator count from 60% of methodCount
rules.solution: Use Math.floor(methodCount * 0.6) as a locator count proxy. Use buildSnippet(className, publicMethods) signature instead of full PO object.

rules.pattern: Tool listed in registerTool but with wrong name vs AppForge parity spec — e.g. generate_fixture instead of generate_test_data_factory
rules.solution: Always grep the TOOL NAME STRING in registerTool calls, not just imports or descriptions. The service may be wired but the public tool name can be wrong. One-line fix: change the string literal in registerTool()

rules.pattern: Token efficiency bundle TASK-35/54/67/47/52: needed ContextManager, TokenBudgetService, ErrorDistiller wired into index.ts
rules.solution: 1) TASK-35 was already done via responseHelper.ts truncate(). 2) ErrorDistiller.ts (src/utils/) — strips noise from Playwright output using line-filter patterns + returns causal chain Step→Selector→Root. Wire into run_playwright_test (format() when failed) and self_heal_test (distill() prepend header). 3) ContextManager.ts (src/services/) — singleton, recordScan(url, domOutput), getCompactedHistory() returns empty string until 3 scans reached. Wire into inspect_page_dom after domInspector.inspect(). 4) TokenBudgetService.ts (src/services/) — singleton, trackToolCall(tool, input, output) returns '[Session Cost: ~N tokens]' footer string. Wire into analyze_codebase and inspect_page_dom return. 5) get_token_budget + get_system_state registered as server.registerTool() — no external service needed. CRITICAL: TS2532 strictness forbids array[length-1].prop — use last?.prop ?? null pattern.

rules.pattern: Zod v4 z.record() requires two type arguments (keySchema, valueSchema). Using z.record(z.string()) as one-arg call fails TS compilation.
rules.solution: Use z.record(z.string(), z.string()) in TestForge (Zod ^4.x). One-arg form removed in Zod v4.

rules.pattern: TestForge McpErrors.projectValidationFailed takes (details: string, toolName?: string) — only 2 args. AppForge variant takes 3 args (projectRoot, issues[], toolName).
rules.solution: In TestForge, call McpErrors.projectValidationFailed(detailString, toolName). Do NOT pass an array as second arg.

SmartDomExtractor (src/utils/SmartDomExtractor.ts): ported from page-agent browser-use DOM engine. Converts Playwright AOM JSON to pruned Actionable Markdown. Handles fallback shape, coordinate-fallback for unselectible elements, caps MAX_NODES=150. Wired into DomInspectorService.inspect() as final transformation. TASK-34: compressFeatureFiles() in TestGenerationService keeps last MAX_GHERKIN_SCREENS=3 feature files in prompt. injectNavGraph() reads .TestForge/nav-graph.md (or graphify-out/nav-graph.md) and caps at 3000 chars. Both injected just before HybridPromptEngine block. exactOptionalPropertyTypes fix: use conditional spread { ...(cond ? {name: val} : {}) } instead of name: val|undefined.

NavigationGraphService (src/services/NavigationGraphService.ts): web port of AppForge mobile original. NavNode=URL+pageName+outgoing edges. NavEdge=triggerSelector+targetUrl+confidence+label. Persists to .TestForge/navigation-map.json and .TestForge/nav-graph.md (Mermaid). Two modes: buildFromStaticAnalysis() scans feature/step/page files for goto/navigate patterns; discoverAppFlow() does live Playwright headless crawl (same-origin, max 25 pages). getKnownPathsText() injects compact nav summary into analyze_codebase output. Per-projectRoot singleton Map via getNavService() in index.ts. Two tools: export_navigation_map (readOnly, static analysis) + discover_app_flow (live crawl). Mermaid diagram auto-written to .TestForge/nav-graph.md which TASK-34 injectNavGraph() picks up automatically. TS fix: regex m[1] needs ?? '' for strictNullChecks.

rules.pattern: TASK-61/41: DnaTrackerService + HeuristicMatcher + SelfHealingService auto-learn integration
rules.solution: 1. HeuristicMatcher in src/utils uses LCS O(m*n) with ?? guards for noUncheckedIndexedAccess. 2. DnaTrackerService in src/services persists locator-dna.json in .TestForge/, uses atomic tmp-swap write, exactOptionalPropertyTypes requires spread { ...condition ? { bestCandidate } : {} }. 3. SelfHealingService.analyzeFailure() takes optional 4th arg projectRoot; DNA hint appended to healInstruction. notifyHealSuccess() auto-learns via LearningService + dnaTracker.recordSuccessfulHeal(). ObservabilityService has no .info() — use .warning(). 4. verify_selector handler extended with autoTrain/oldSelector/projectRoot params; calls selfHealer.notifyHealSuccess on success.

rules.pattern: OrchestrationService.createTestAtomically used duck-typing (typeof (x as any).method === 'function') to guess FileWriterService method names, and spread the returned {written, warnings} object into string[]. Runtime crash risk.
rules.solution: Always use the typed public API: writerService.writeFiles(root, files, false) returns {written: string[], warnings: string[]}. Destructure explicitly. Never use (service as any) for method discovery in production code.

rules.pattern: Merging remote fixes into a local feature branch with uncommitted changes and build artifact conflicts.
rules.solution: 1. Stash local changes. 2. Fetch and merge the remote branch. 3. Pop stash and resolve conflicts (typically in dist/ or generated files) by choosing the merged version or rebuilding. 4. Run mandatory graph synchronization (build_appforge_graph.py). 5. Commit and push the combined result.

rules.pattern: Token bloat on multi-page E2E flows (5-page flows consuming 18k+ tokens)
rules.solution: Four-part fix: (1) Remove raw YAML block from SmartDomExtractor.extractFromAriaYaml — saves ~5k tokens per 5-page flow. (2) Set ContextManager.RECENT_SCANS_TO_KEEP=1 to drop prior page DOM from context. (3) Update workflow_guide write_test steps to enforce per-page inspect→generate→write loop. (4) Use keyword-relevance filter in TestGenerationService.generatePromptInstruction with MAX_STEPS=60 and MAX_PAGE_OBJECTS=10 caps.
